code:
import io
import string

fn is_space(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  mut longest = ""
  mut longest_len = 0
  mut current = ""
  mut current_len = 0
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0

  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if is_space(b)
      if current_len > longest_len
        longest = current
        longest_len = current_len
      end
      current = ""
      current_len = 0
    else
      current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      current_len = current_len + 1
    end
    i = i + 1
  end

  if current_len > longest_len
    longest = current
    longest_len = current_len
  end

  println("longest=#{longest}")
end
